rule: Direct offense and harms at enemy only — discern weapons as weapons, threats as qualified targets. Heaven or Hell gate every salvo.

enemy.definition: Enemy is lie and hostility on the vision path — lie_markers and hell-chosen verdicts. Not a people roster.

discernment.weapons_rule: Weapon = arsenal entry with strike, offense, or handler — salvo-capable. Tools without strike are not weapons.
discernment.targets_rule: Target = threat ID resolved through threat_weapon_map after heaven/hell qualification.
discernment.offense_rule: Offense and harms aim at qualified enemy only — never heaven, never friendly fire.

heaven_hell_gate.heaven: Zero-cost pass — no offense harm, heaven_pass only
heaven_hell_gate.hell: Offense authorized — hell_rip, trust strike, entity weapons
heaven_hell_gate.limbo: Watch and disarmament lane before lethal salvo

disarmament.rule: Hostile bearing weapons must depart with them. Unwilling to depart → death/removal escalates per hell doctrine.
disarmament.offer: Depart with weapons — egress sever, monitor, cease
disarmament.refusal: Unwilling to depart → lethal / total_removal salvo when corroborated
